title: Goldman’s bitcoin ETF push signals Wall Street taming of crypto
description: The proposed ETF aims to provide exposure to bitcoin while generating income through premium-based options

title: Bitcoin News: Strategy’s $1 Billion Bitcoin Buy Pushes Saylor Back Into Profit as BTC Hits $75,000
description: After Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) crashed from $126,000 to $60,000 due to the Middle East war, Strategy was billions in the red. The question on everyone’s mind was whether Saylor’s all-in Bitcoin bet had finally backfired. But instead of capitulating, he bought $1 billion more. Strategy disclosed the purchase on April 13, and by April 14, ... Bitcoin News: Strategy’s $1 Billion Bitcoin Buy Pushes Saylor Back Into Profit as BTC Hits $75,000
